statsig.label: Statsig focus
statsig.plan_line: Statsig for feature gates, experiments, and results — rollout and experiment causation.
statsig.base_notes: Read feature-gate definitions (incl. stale-gate detection), experiment configs and results/metrics, dynamic configs, layers/holdouts, and project config via the official Statsig MCP server (Console API). Read-only is enforced by an omni_read_only Console API key (writes are rejected at the API; see SETUP.md). WARNING: the server exposes gate/experiment-mutation tools (Create_Gate, Update_Gate_Entirely, Create/Update_Experiment_Entirely) — never call them; the read-only key blocks them.
